violations.text: Staff failed to sanitize equipment (coffee pots) after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Sanitizing methods were reviewed with the person in charge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
